description.text:
Job Requisition ID #

26WD97697

Position Overview

As Govt Territory Account Sales Executive you will be responsible to expands new business and renewals in Government accounts to exceed financial and company goals. This individual contributor job is assigned a sales quota and performance is measured by quarterly and annual targets by up-selling, add-on sale, and cross-selling. You will report to Director- Sales – Govt Business and will work with our BDRs, Account Based Marketing team and Autodesk Channel Partners

Responsibilities

Create new business by creatively expanding existing and new accounts & Manage renewals in each assigned accounts

Evaluate and prepare business plans for each assigned account

Evaluate the customer profile, create value messaging, and target important steps needed to implement the account plans

Develop important relationships within the account including Executive connect.

Translate customer challenges and priorities into unique value propositions

Ensure the Autodesk team delivers value to the account, implementing the account plan

Grow opportunity pipeline within the assigned accounts, uses sound call planning to achieve your goals and make continuous improvement in moving Autodesk from vendor to trusted advisor

Manage accounts through entire sales process; this is an outside field sales position, physically at customer location for business development, prospecting, and opportunity qualification through contract negotiations, signing, and post-sales support

Manage complex Govt tenders at multiple levels within the assigned account, with primary focus/importance on senior/executive management

Deliver an accurate weekly, monthly & quarterly forecast of business

Collaborate with channel partners to understand their business, creatively adopt programs to increase new revenue, and expand partner relationships

Be a Trusted Adviser for customers & identify win/win situations & develop success reference stories

Represent India Public Sector business in providing regular customer feedback to the product, industry & strategy teams to help identify product gaps and areas of improvement

Minimum Qualification

5+ years experience with quota achievement selling with on prem, SaaS or a hybrid model

A proven track-record in managing and growing Govt & Public Sector accounts

Enterprise Technology Software sales experience with direct and indirect selling channels

Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience

Experience in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction or Manufacturing industries

Strong sales process and account planning skills (TAS, Value & Outcome Based Selling)

Strong executive selling and relationship experience

Experience of working along with Channels & VAR ecosystem

#LI-GC3

Learn More

About Autodesk

Welcome to Autodesk! Amazing things are created every day with our software – from the greenest buildings and cleanest cars to the smartest factories and biggest hit movies. We help innovators turn their ideas into reality, transforming not only how things are made, but what can be made.

We take great pride in our culture here at Autodesk – it’s at the core of everything we do. Our culture guides the way we work and treat each other, informs how we connect with customers and partners, and defines how we show up in the world.

When you’re an Autodesker, you can do meaningful work that helps build a better world designed and made for all. Ready to shape the world and your future? Join us!

Salary transparency

Salary is one part of Autodesk’s competitive compensation package. Offers are based on the candidate’s experience and geographic location. In addition to base salaries, our compensation package may include annual cash bonuses, commissions for sales roles, stock grants, and a comprehensive benefits package.

Diversity & Belonging
We take pride in cultivating a culture of belonging where everyone can thrive. Learn more here: https://www.autodesk.com/company/diversity-and-belonging

Are you an existing contractor or consultant with Autodesk?

Please search for open jobs and apply internally (not on this external site).

description.text:
Job Requisition ID #

26WD97635

Position Overview

The Credit Analyst II evaluates customer creditworthiness and manages a portfolio of past-due accounts to minimize risk and optimize cash flow. This role balances sound credit decisions with strong customer relationship management, partnering cross-functionally to resolve issues and drive collections performance. Reporting to the Senior Manager, Credit & Collections, this position offers a flexible hybrid work arrangement.

Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of assigned accounts that are behind schedule in their payments to the Company. Research account financial / operating situation to identify indications of deteriorating financial conditions. Contact customers regarding payment of overdue invoices. Secure information from customers regarding the basis for non-payment, including:

Customer’s temporary financial inability to pay the invoice short term

 Customer’s dissatisfaction with some element of the Company’s products or services and need for resolution of product/service issue prior to payment

Customer’s long-term financial insolvency and potential for never paying the invoice

Maintain an ongoing program of appraisal and analysis of account activity / payment status. Identify accounts whose continued failure to adhere to payment schedules / honor payments commitments indicates limited potential for securing payments through continued collections efforts. Make recommendations as appropriate to department management regarding the viability of transferring accounts to a third-party collections agency or legal action

Manage customers tax deductions and the maintenance of relevant supporting documents

Support credit and collections data maintenance and reporting

Credit Evaluation

Conduct financial research regarding the credit worthiness of customers and potential customers, using available credit rating services, annual financial statements, information from financial institutions, other creditors, public/private sector sources, and information obtained directly from customers to determine the viability of extending credit to customers relating to the purchase of the Company’s products and services

Investigate information relating to credit applications that is inconsistent with other reported data / information, or that indicates a possible concern with the applicant’s financial / operating stability. As appropriate, contact applicant representatives directly to secure clarifying / supplemental data regarding the issue of concern

Make business decisions regarding the viability of extending credit to customers and potential customers using the Company’s established credit matrix and corresponding processes to determine credit worthiness. Identify and approve credit applications of customers whose financial / business performance meets matrix requirements, subject to the Analyst’s assigned financial limitations. Identify and disapprove credit applications of customers whose financial / business performance fails to meet matrix requirements or whose past record of business activity with Autodesk / record of payments indicates an unacceptable credit risk. Develop and maintain written documentation of all approved / disapproved credit decisions• Develop formal written / oral analysis of marginal credit applications, escalating the credit application to regional credit management for evaluation and determination. Ensure supporting credit analysis includes information relating to all factors considered relating to the application’s credit worthiness as defined within the parameters of the credit matrix

Coordination

Negotiate with customers experiencing short-term financial constraints to secure commitments to pay amounts due in the shortest time possible, (including arrangements for rescheduling of the payments process). Follow up with customers to ensure commitments to pay are honored. Team with Company Channels/Sales as necessary to secure support for payment

Work with dissatisfied customers to identify the nature of the problem relating to the Company’s products and/or services and with Company Operations to arrange for appropriate technical staff support to address/rectify the issue. Team with Company Channel/Sales to resolve the customer issue and secure customer payment

Provide ongoing updates of client contact / client commitments discuss negotiating strategy / possible alternatives, review performance to date against the Company’s standard metrics

Minimum Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree preferred

5+ years of credit and collections experience

SAP experience required

Strong Excel and data analysis skills

Salesforce experience preferred

Strong negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills

Analytical mindset with attention to detail

Preferred Qualifications

Salesforce experience

Experience reporting into a multinational/matrixed environment

International languages (Spanish, French, German, etc.)

Experience dealing with online customer billing portals

employer.name: Alteryx
employer.briefDescription: Our mission is to unleash the thrill inherent in solving problems, using our platform to fuel remarkable business and social outcomes.

description.text:
Meet the Moment with Alteryx

We're living through a once-in-a-generation shift in how work gets done. Data, automation, and AI are quickly becoming the center of every business decision - and Alteryx is leading the transformation.

You'll be working on the challenges that sit at the heart of modern business. No matter your role, the work you do will help organizations move faster, see more clearly, and tackle questions that used to feel impossible.

If you're ready to meet the moment with innovation, curiosity, and excellence, there's a place for you here.

We are looking for an experienced Cloud Engineer that will help our team establish DevOps best practices. Security in the cloud will be a primary concern. You will implement continuous integration and deployment processes, develop automation around Kubernetes deployment of our products, and contribute to our micro-service architecture and implementation. The ideal candidate will have a strong customer driven focus on providing the tooling that enables our internal development customers.

Required Skills:

Minimum 3 + years of Cloud Engineering experience

The ability to balance and prioritize multiple projects and remain calm under pressure.

3 + years Kubernetes and Helm experience a must

2 + years CI/CD (Gitlab preferred)

2+ years Major cloud provider tooling (AWS, Azure, GCP)

Agile / Lean

3 + years configuration management and Infrastructure as Code (e.g. Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible, Pulumi)

Any general programming/scripting skills (e.g. Python, Go Lang, Node.js + Express.js, TypeScript)

Valued Skills:

Excellent problem solving and analytical skills.

GitOps based deployment processes (ArgoCD preferred)

Build and maintain highly available systems.

A strong desire to work with new and upcoming technologies.

Find yourself checking a lot of these boxes but doubting whether you should apply? At Alteryx, we support a growth mindset for our associates through all stages of their careers. If you meet some of the requirements and you share our values, we encourage you to apply. As part of our ongoing commitment to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workplace, we’re invested in building teams with a wide variety of backgrounds, identities, and experiences .

This position involves access to software/technology that is subject to U.S. export controls. Any job offer made will be contingent upon the applicant’s capacity to serve in compliance with U.S. export controls.

description.text:
Responsibilities & Key Deliverables
Manage a set of dealerships and dealer team to achieve the business parameters like volumes, market share, collection, deliveries, spares part sales etc.
Inquiry generation and management (CDMS).
New dealership development along with Channel team.
Ensuring viable distribution network by appointing dealers, sub-dealers for appropriate market coverage.
Implementation of specific incentive schemes for dealers.
Participate in development and/or execution of field activities.
Ensure availability of trained manpower in adequate quantity at dealerships, developing them for pre-sales and sales processes, new product features / modifications.
Executing company strategy at dealership along with local level sales promotion campaigns, product launches etc.
Scrutinize the Financial Health of dealer.
Liaison with financial institutions / banks for exploring new avenues for retail financing of product.
Track the competitor activities, capture feedback on performance of competitor (and our) products.

Sales

B.Tech /BE - Agriculture (Preferred) / Mechanical / Auto Mobile

Diploma –Agriculture, Mechanical, Auto Mobile

General Experience

1 to 5 years of relevant experience in Sales

Critical Experience

1 - 5 year Relevant Sales Experience.Exposure to 1 - 2 diverse markets. (Different States.Should have worked in Rural Markets.

Basic understanding of Farm Industry, Tractor and Implements

Change Management
Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
Financial Concepts
Product Knowledge & Application
Sales Planning

description.text:
Responsibilities & Key Deliverables

The role will drive solution-led institutional and rural sales growth through data-driven rural analytics, district-level performance insights, and application-based CV strategies. The incumbent will work closely with cross-functional teams, AFS dealers, VAP teams, and external stakeholders to develop integrated PV and CV solution offerings. The role will also support strategic initiatives including Swachh Bharat-related solutions and institutional partnerships.

Key Responsibilities

Solution Selling – PV & CV

Design and implement end-to-end solution selling approaches for institutional customers across PV and CV portfolios
Develop customized offerings combining vehicles, financing, service, uptime solutions, and VAPs
Work closely with internal stakeholders to ensure seamless execution of solution proposals

CV Application-Based Strategy

Develop application-led strategies for CV segments such as logistics, construction, municipal services, agriculture, and infrastructure
Partner with customers to understand operational pain points and recommend optimized CV solutions
Support solution initiatives aligned to Swachh Bharat and other government programs
Support key institutional bids and tenders with application insights

Rural Analytics & Strategy

Develop and monitor district-wise sales performance dashboards for rural, semi-urban, and institutional markets
Analyze district-level data to identify growth pockets, white spaces, and underperforming geographies
Translate analytics into actionable insights for regional and field teams
Support leadership with periodic MIS, forecasts, and performance reviews
Education Qualification

Graduate / Masters

General Experience

10–15 years of experience in the Automobile Industry, with strong exposure to Commercial Vehicles (CV), Passenger Vehicles (PV), and solution selling

Critical Experience
Strong knowledge of CV and PV markets, especially rural and institutional segment
Proven experience in solution selling and consultative sales
Advanced analytical and data interpretation skills
Strategic thinking with strong execution orientation
Stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration

Job Segment: Automotive

Job Segment: Automotive

description.text:
Valeo is a tech global company, designing breakthrough solutions to reinvent the mobility. We are an automotive supplier partner to automakers and new mobility actors worldwide. Our vision? Invent a greener and more secured mobility, thanks to solutions focusing on intuitive driving and reducing CO2 emissions. We are leader on our businesses, and recognized as one of the largest global innovative companies.

Participate/lead brainstorming sessions and new ideas generation:

Provides technical inputs to the R&I Project Team in his/her expertise field(s)

Develop/support Proof of Concept (be able to produce mock-up from concept to realization)

Solves and overcomes blocking issues in innovation by proposing new ideas providing the relevant analysis & justification, etc… in the frame of his/her work-package

Develops, tests and explains solution(s) selection based on multi-criteria decision matrix

Define new experimental protocols for new products validation

Identifies and proposes optimization potential on existing products

Participates to ensure smooth and effective transfer of R&I projects to business when decided

Capitalizes the know-how (write state of the art synthesis, technical guidance, procedures,standards …)

Cross-fertilizes knowledge, developed during R&I project, across Division / PG or Cluster

Manages the internal and external contributors in his/her field:

Manages the R&D internal contributors with the Disciplines Department (calculation, testing facilities, etc.), checks alignment between needs and availabilities and resources.

Deals with external partners for prototyping and technological roadmaps

Protects Innovation:

Write IDMs to formalize innovative ideas and proposes mining strategy when relevant

Performs Freedom to Operate analysis (FTO)

Watches Technologies & Benchmarks:

Anticipates possible technological turns by identifying and analyzing relevant information sources

Explores alternative technological solutions used in adjacent industries and assess their potential for automotive application

Contributes to the construction of the roadmap included in SPP for the next generation of product

Participates to the most relevant events (ie. Experts symposium, conferences, round table, customers techdays…)

Analyzes competitors ‘products and patents to assess and select innovative solutions to nourish R&I Projects according to their potential

NB.: Adv Dev. and R&I missions may be combined. The Job Description should then consolidate the missions and responsibilities of both. According to the context the n+1 will decide to give the R&I or AD Job title.

Job:

Research & Innovation

Organization:

Product Management

Schedule:

Full time

Employee Status:

Regular

Job Type:

Permanent contract

Job Posting Date:

2026-05-04

Join Us !
Being part of our team, you will join:
- one of the largest global innovative companies, with more than 20,000 engineers working in Research & Development
- a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration
- more than 100,000 colleagues in 31 countries... which make a lot of opportunity for career growth
- a business highly committed to limiting the environmental impact if its activities and ranked by Corporate Knights as the number one company in the automotive sector in terms of sustainable development

More information on Valeo: https://www.valeo.com

  • Develops, tests and explains solution(s) selection based on multi-criteria decision matrix

  • Define new experimental protocols for new products validation

  • Identifies and proposes optimization potential on existing products

  • Participates to ensure smooth and effective transfer of R&I projects to business when decided

  • Capitalizes the know-how (write state of the art synthesis, technical guidance, procedures,standards …)

  • Cross-fertilizes knowledge, developed during R&I project, across Division / PG or Cluster

Manages the internal and external contributors in his/her field:

  • Manages the R&D internal contributors with the Disciplines Department (calculation, testing facilities, etc.), checks alignment between needs and availabilities and resources.

  • Deals with external partners for prototyping and technological roadmaps

Protects Innovation:

  • Write IDMs to formalize innovative ideas and proposes mining strategy when relevant

  • Performs Freedom to Operate analysis (FTO)

Watches Technologies & Benchmarks:

  • Anticipates possible technological turns by identifying and analyzing relevant information sources

  • Explores alternative technological solutions used in adjacent industries and assess their potential for automotive application

  • Contributes to the construction of the roadmap included in SPP for the next generation of product

  • Participates to the most relevant events (ie. Experts symposium, conferences, round table, customers techdays…)

  • Analyzes competitors ‘products and patents to assess and select innovative solutions to nourish R&I Projects according to their potential

NB.: Adv Dev. and R&I missions may be combined. The Job Description should then consolidate the missions and responsibilities of both. According to the context the n+1 will decide to give the R&I or AD Job title.

Job:

Research & Innovation

Organization:

Product Management

Schedule:

Full time

Employee Status:

Regular

Job Type:

Permanent contract

Job Posting Date:

2026-05-04
Join Us !
Being part of our team, you will join:
  • one of the largest global innovative companies, with more than 20,000 engineers working in Research & Development
  • a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration
  • more than 100,000 colleagues in 31 countries... which make a lot of opportunity for career growth
  • a business highly committed to limiting the environmental impact if its activities and ranked by Corporate Knights as the number one company in the automotive sector in terms of sustainable development

More information on Valeo: https://www.valeo.com

occupations.MGTWW: Business Management, Administrative & Customer Support Occupations

description.text:
Job Title: Senior Manager – Human Resources
Location: Mumbai based only – Remote (Work from Home) F2F Meeting, once a week
No. of Positions: 1
Industry: Any Industry

Key Responsibilities
1. Lead HR Strategy & Team:
• Direct the HR team to deliver exceptional results, fostering a culture of collaboration and innovation.
• Mentor and develop HR professionals to enhance team capabilities.
2. Drive Recruitment Excellence:
• Oversee end-to-end recruitment, from talent sourcing to onboarding, to attract top-tier talent.
3. Ensure Statutory Compliance:
• Develop and implement HR policies compliant with Indian labour laws.
• Conduct regular audits to ensure adherence to statutory requirements.
4. Enhance Employee Engagement:
• Design and implement innovative engagement programs to boost morale and retention.
• Foster a positive work environment through effective employee relations, grievance handling and conflict resolution.
5. Optimize HR Operations:
• Manage payroll, benefits, and HR operations with precision and compliance.
• Leverage HR technologies (e.g., ATS, HRMS) to streamline processes.
6. Champion Performance & Development:
• Develop performance management systems and talent development programs to nurture employee growth.
7. Align HR with Business Goals:
• Partner with senior leadership to integrate HR strategies with organisational objectives.
8. Innovate HR Practices:
• Lead the adoption of cutting-edge HR tools and practices to drive efficiency and impact.

Eligibility & Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
• Master’s degree or HR certifications (e.g., SHRM, PHR, CHRP).
• 10-15 years of progressive HR experience, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role.
• Proven expertise in managing full-cycle HR functions.
• Hands-on experience with HR systems such as Zoho, Spine, Oracle HCM, Darwin Box, KEKA or similar platforms.
• Demonstrated experience in migration and implementation of HRMS systems

Desired Skills & Competencies
• Exceptional leadership and team management abilities.
• Strategic thinking with a focus on aligning HR with business objectives.
• Excellent communication, interpersonal, and problem-solving skills.
• Ability to work independently and drive transformative change.
• In-depth understanding of Indian labour laws, including state-specific regulations.
• Strong grasp of HR best practices and compliance requirements.
• Demonstrated success in building employee engagement and retention programmes.
• Strong analytical skills to leverage HR metrics for decision-making.

employer.name: Worley
employer.briefDescription: A leading global provider of professional project and asset services in the energy, chemicals and resources sectors
employer.address: Level 17, 141 Walker Street, North Sydney NSW 2060

description.text:
We deliver the world’s most complex projects.
Work as part of a collaborative and inclusive team.
Enjoy a varied & challenging role.

Building on our past. Ready for the future

Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts headquartered in Australia.

Right now, we’re bridging two worlds as we accelerate to more sustainable energy sources, while helping our customers provide the energy, chemicals and resources that society needs now.

We partner with our customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their portfolio of assets. We solve complex problems by finding integrated data-centric solutions from the first stages of consulting and engineering to installation and commissioning, to the last stages of decommissioning and remediation. Join us and help drive innovation and sustainability in our projects.

The Role

As a Senior Electrical Switchyard Engineer with Worley, you will work closely with our existing team to deliver projects for our clients while continuing to develop your skills and experience etc.

Monitor own progress and ensure it comes within project schedule and quality.

Comply with the Quality and EHS policies from the project, business, unit and corporate within the own area of responsibility;
Ensure a coordinate approach in all areas with the other design engineering Activities;
Ensure that the design of his Engineering function is according to the applicable rules, regulations codes and standards and according to good engineering practices especially with regard to Environmental aspects and Health & Safety of Site Personal, Operators, Maintenance personnel and third parties,
Take-over project from the offer-team, review/comment and reach agreement on the actual project documentation: Scope of supply and Division of Work, Cost-calculation incl. supplier offers for tendering purposes, “Delta list”, showing the differences between a reference power plant and the contacted plant, Technical and commercial contract documentation as appropriate for his work and his team risk review.
Independently applies standard design techniques, procedures and criteria acquired through extensive project work experience
Holds adequate skills in the operation of design aiding IT tools and provide support and guidance to the subordinate team members
Familiar with the Power Industry Products & Equipment.
Basic knowledge of the power plant/ industry process
Preparation of capacity planning and subsequent staffing according to the project requirements.
Coordinate with the Project Engineering Manager and other projects LE the information workflow and mitigate in case of problems.
Ensure fulfilment of design, quality, constructability and functionality of this scope of supply and services at the best cost according to the project and contractual requirements.
Ensure by pro-active follow-up “on-time” delivery
Identify, plan and conduct Design Reviews and the Design Freeze and ensure that corrective actions defined by the Design Reviews are closed on time.
Ensure experience feedback from the project to the Lesson Learnt System.
Compile the project documentation and organize a proper archiving of all project’s relevant documents with the applicable tools.
Candidates shall be willing to work for high pressure EPC jobs, Co-ordinating with site and Manufacturers to resolve technical issues during Commissioning.
Switchyard physical design engineering for Transmission & Distribution projects involving Air Insulated Switchyard (AIS) and Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) substations up to 400/765 kV.

Preparation and review of switchyard layout drawings, equipment arrangement plans, section/elevation drawings, busbar layouts, gantry structures, cable routing layouts, grounding layouts, and foundation inputs.

About You

To be considered for this role it is envisaged you will possess the following attributes:

Electrical Engineering Degree/ Post Graduation from reputed Institute.

Having overall experience of 08-15 years in the electrical engineering
Thorough knowledge of all Switchyard design
Shall have knowledge of Switchyard equipment layout design, busbar layouts, gantry structure design, cable routine layouts, grounding and power layouts.
Shall be able to develop MR / Tender specification for switchyards.
Shall be able to carried out TBA and Vendor drawing review.
Shall be able to offer commissioning support & troubleshooting.
Shall be well versed in advanced MS excel to develop various setting calculations & templates. Preferred to have hands on experience on E Tap.
Must have basic knowledge for industrial power system design and substation design
Must have basic knowledge for industrial plant detailed engineering including lightning, earthing, equipment sizing, etc.
Experience in working with international clients with knowledge of national and international standards
Is fluent in English (written and spoken) and able to lead negotiations in English and good communication skill. Shall be able to lead coordination with other stake holders such as Primary Design Team, BOP Team, Customer, Owners Engineers & vendors
Shall have ability to plan, organize and co-ordinate well, to delegate and supervise accordingly;
Effective communication enjoys personal contact.
Shall believe in “customer-oriented delivery
Shall be ready and willing to accept changes (Learning capability, openness to innovations, flexibility, self-criticism). shall be willing to work for high pressure EPC jobs, Co-ordinating with site and Manufacturers to resolve technical issues during Commissioning

Experience in electrical system studies including short circuit analysis, load flow studies, and relay setting calculations for EHV substations and switchyards.

Familiar with relevant IEC/IS standards, utility specifications, and engineering practices for switchyard design and execution

Moving forward together

We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.

We’re building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace. Creating a space where everyone feels they belong, can be themselves, and are heard.

And we're not just talking about it; we're doing it. We're reskilling our people, leveraging transferable skills, and supporting the transition of our workforce to become experts in today's low carbon energy infrastructure and technology.

Whatever your ambition, there’s a path for you here. And there’s no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

Worley takes personal data protection seriously and respects EU and local data protection laws. You can read our full Recruitment Privacy Notice Here .

Please note: If you are being represented by a recruitment agency you will not be considered, to be considered you will need to apply directly to Worley. .

employer.name: SimCorp
employer.briefDescription: SimCorp is a provider of industry-leading integrated investment management solutions for the global buy side.  Founded in 1971, with more than 3,000 employees across five continents.

description.text:
Lead Software Engineer

WHAT MAKES US, US

Join some of the most innovative thinkers in FinTech as we lead the evolution of financial technology. If you are an innovative, curious, collaborative person who embraces challenges and wants to grow, learn and pursue outcomes with our prestigious financial clients, say Hello to SimCorp!

At its foundation, SimCorp is guided by our values — caring, customer success-driven, collaborative, curious, and courageous. Our people-centered organization focuses on skills development, relationship building, and client success. We take pride in cultivating an environment where all team members can grow, feel heard, valued, and empowered.

If you like what we’re saying, keep reading!

WHY THIS ROLE IS IMPORTANT TO US

We are seeking a Lead Software Engineer who will be responsible for leading and driving the design, development, and implementation of complex software solutions. With typically 7+ years of experience, this role involves collaborating in cross-functional teams to develop high-quality software that meets business requirements and technical specifications.

The Lead Software Engineer takes ownership of key engineering projects, provides technical guidance to junior engineers, and ensures that software is delivered on time and within scope. This position requires advanced problem-solving skills, expertise in software engineering practices, and the ability to work in a collaborative and demanding environment

WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR

You will be using multiple technologies, and your responsibilities will also include:

Lead the design and development of software solutions, ensuring they meet business needs and technical requirements

Provide technical leadership and mentorship to engineering teams, promoting a collaborative and high-performance environment.

Collaborate with product management, design, and quality assurance teams to ensure seamless integration and delivery of software solutions

Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, ensuring high-quality solutions that are scalable, reliable, and performant.

Ensure adherence to software development best practices, including coding standards, testing, and documentation.

Take charge of key features and components, leading their design and implementation from concept to delivery.

Continuously assess and improve engineering processes, recommending new tools and technologies to enhance productivity and software quality

Participate in code reviews, ensuring that the team follows best practices and maintains high standards for software quality

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Most importantly, you can see yourself contributing and thriving in the position described above. How you gained the skills needed for doing that is less important. We expect you to be good at several of the following and be able to - and interested in - learning the rest.

Programming

Enforces coding standards across the team for .NET Core APIs, C# and Angular applications .

Delivers high‑quality, secure, and maintainable code in complex, business‑critical areas.

Databases & Data Structures

Relatively good understanding of relational (SQL Server/Azure SQL) or non‑relational (Cosmos DB/MongoDB) databases.

DevOps & CI/CD

Experience of working with CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions.

Cloud Technologies

Experience of working with cloud‑native solutions on Azure (App Services, Functions, Storage, Key Vault).

Experience of working with microservices architecture.

Design & Planning

Lead system architecture for major subsystems integrating .NET back‑end and Angular front‑end.

Partners with stakeholders to define technical direction and long‑term plans.

Debugging & Problem Solving

Resolves complex, multi‑service issues across distributed systems.

Improves system resilience and prevents recurrence through root‑cause analysis and system‑level fixes.

WHAT WE VALUE

Azure certifications (e.g., AZ-900, AZ-204).

Experience with containerization (Docker, Podman).

BENEFITS

Global hybrid work policy - We ask you to work 2 days a week from the office. If you choose you can work remotely the other days. Of course you are welcome at the office if that is your preference.

Growth and innovation - Every 6th sprint is reserved for planning and innovation. So, with regular intervals you have a chance to explore and learn new skills or improve something that you believe will be beneficial to you, your team or the application.

Self-Direction - High degree of self-organization. Each team and developer have a high degree of freedom to plan, organize and design their work.

Inclusive and diverse company culture

Work-life balance – We believe that an equilibrium between professional responsibilities makes us all the best version of ourselves, both in private life and as colleagues in the workplace

Empowerment – We believe that all voices are valuable and must be heard. You will be involved in shaping our work processes

NEXT STEPS

Please send us your application in English via our career site as soon as possible, we process incoming applications continually. Please note that only applications sent through our system will be processed. At SimCorp, we recognize that bias can unintentionally occur in the recruitment process. To uphold fairness and equal opportunities for all applicants, we kindly ask you to exclude personal data such as photo, age, or any non-professional information from your application. Thank you for aiding us in our endeavor to mitigate biases in our recruitment process.

If you are interested in being a part of SimCorp but are not sure this role is suitable, submit your CV anyway. SimCorp is on an exciting growth journey, and our Talent Acquisition Team is ready to assist you discover the right role for you. The approximate time to consider your CV is three weeks.

We are eager to continually improve our talent acquisition process and make everyone’s experience positive and valuable. Therefore, during the process we will ask you to provide your feedback, which is highly appreciated.

WHO WE ARE

For over 50 years, we have worked closely with investment and asset managers to become the world’s leading provider of integrated investment management solutions. We are 3,000+ colleagues with a broad range of nationalities, educations, professional experiences, ages, and backgrounds.

SimCorp is an independent subsidiary of the Deutsche Börse Group. Following the recent merger with Axioma, we leverage the combined strength of our brands to provide an industry-leading, full, front-to-back offering for our clients.

SimCorp is an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds, without regard to race, gender, age, disability, or any other protected status under applicable law. We are committed to building a culture where diverse perspectives and expertise are integrated into our everyday work. We believe in the continual growth and development of our employees, so that we can provide best-in-class solutions to our clients.

#Li-Hybrid

We take pride in cultivating an environment where all team members can grow, feel heard, valued, and empowered.

If you like what we’re saying, keep reading!

WHY THIS ROLE IS IMPORTANT TO US

We are seeking a Principal Software Engineer who will be responsible for designing, developing, and delivering software solutions that meet both business and client requirements. With typically 11+ years of experience, this role involves leading engineering projects, providing technical guidance, and ensuring the scalability, performance, and quality of software systems.

The Principal Software Engineer collaborates closely with product management, design, and other engineering teams to define technical solutions and integrate them into the product development lifecycle. This position necessitates advanced problem-solving skills, expertise in software engineering practices, and the ability to mentor teammates.

WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR

You will be using multiple technologies, and your responsibilities will also include:

Lead the design and development of complex software solutions, ensuring they meet business and client needs.

Provide technical leadership, guidance, and mentorship to other engineers, creating a culture of innovation and excellence.

Collaborate in cross-functional teams, including product management and quality assurance, to ensure seamless integration of solutions into the product.

Review and improve software design, architecture, and implementation to ensure performance, scalability, and maintainability.

Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, ensuring the timely delivery of high-quality solutions.

Stay up to date with emerging technologies and best practices, continuously improving engineering processes and solutions.

Contribute to the development of technical documentation and ensure alignment with product specifications and user requirements.

Participate in code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards and best practices.

Facilitate design discussions and work break down with team and stakeholders.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Most importantly, you can see yourself contributing and thriving in the position described above. How you gained the skills needed for doing that is less important. We expect you to be good at several of the following and be able to - and interested in - learning the rest.

Programming

Deep expertise in .NET Core, C#, and Angular frameworks.

Solid focus on code quality, maintainability, security, and documentation.

Champion of coding standards, design patterns, and best practices across the team.

Databases & Data Structures

Advanced knowledge of relational (SQL Server/Azure SQL) or non‑relational (Cosmos DB/MongoDB) databases.

DevOps & CI/CD Practices

Solid understanding of Azure DevOps and modern CI/CD pipelines.

Advocate of automation, Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Azure Bicep, and continuous testing.

Cloud Technologies

Proficient grasp of Azure cloud services (App Services, Functions, Storage, Key Vault, Azure AD B2C etc).

Experienced in architecting cloud‑native solutions around microservices including good experience with containerization (Docker) and cloud security best practices.

Design & Planning

Design software features, evaluating size, risks and planning implementation, task breakdown and efficient collaboration.

Debugging & Problem Solving

Resolves complex, multi‑service issues across distributed systems.

Improves system resilience and prevents recurrence through root‑cause analysis and system‑level fixes.

WHAT WE VALUE

Azure certifications (e.g., AZ-900, AZ-204).

Experience with containerization (Docker, Container Apps)

BENEFITS

Global hybrid work policy - We ask you to work 2 days a week from the office. If you choose you can work remotely the other days. Of course you are welcome at the office if that is your preference.

Growth and innovation - Every 6th sprint is reserved for planning and innovation. So, with regular intervals you have a chance to explore and learn new skills or improve something that you believe will be beneficial to you, your team or the application.

Self-Direction - High degree of self-organization. Each team and developer have a high degree of freedom to plan, organize and design their work.

Inclusive and diverse company culture

Work-life balance – We believe that an equilibrium between professional responsibilities makes us all the best version of ourselves, both in private life and as colleagues in the workplace

Empowerment – We believe that all voices are valuable and must be heard. You will be involved in shaping our work processes

NEXT STEPS

Please send us your application in English via our career site as soon as possible, we process incoming applications continually. Please note that only applications sent through our system will be processed. At SimCorp, we recognize that bias can unintentionally occur in the recruitment process. To uphold fairness and equal opportunities for all applicants, we kindly ask you to exclude personal data such as photo, age, or any non-professional information from your application. Thank you for aiding us in our endeavor to mitigate biases in our recruitment process.

If you are interested in being a part of SimCorp but are not sure this role is suitable, submit your CV anyway. SimCorp is on an exciting growth journey, and our Talent Acquisition Team is ready to assist you discover the right role for you. The approximate time to consider your CV is three weeks.

We are eager to continually improve our talent acquisition process and make everyone’s experience positive and valuable. Therefore, during the process we will ask you to provide your feedback, which is highly appreciated.

WHO WE ARE

For over 50 years, we have worked closely with investment and asset managers to become the world’s leading provider of integrated investment management solutions. We are 3,000+ colleagues with a broad range of nationalities, educations, professional experiences, ages, and backgrounds.

SimCorp is an independent subsidiary of the Deutsche Börse Group. Following the recent merger with Axioma, we leverage the combined strength of our brands to provide an industry-leading, full, front-to-back offering for our clients.

SimCorp is an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds, without regard to race, gender, age, disability, or any other protected status under applicable law. We are committed to building a culture where diverse perspectives and expertise are integrated into our everyday work. We believe in the continual growth and development of our employees, so that we can provide best-in-class solutions to our clients.

#Li-Hybrid

description.text:
Job category
IT&S
Experience level
Senior
Relocation available
This role is eligible for relocation within country
Job type
Professionals
Travel required
Up to 10% travel should be expected with this role
Job code
RQ110141
As a Staff Enterprise Technology Engineer, you will act as a senior technology leader and domain guide responsible for the design, integration, and operation of enterprise platforms supporting Mobility & Convenience retail operations. This role focuses on technology strategy, system integration, operational perfection, and governance rather than hands-on software development. You will partner closely with product, architecture, security, and operations teams to ensure scalable, compliant, and resilient enterprise solutions.

What you will deliver

Own the design and evolution of enterprise technology solutions spanning retail back office, fuel, payments, ERP, and supply chain platforms

Own system integration strategies across SAP Retail, PDI, and back office ecosystems

Define enterprise technology standards, integration patterns, and non-functional requirements (security, reliability, performance, compliance)

Drive delivery of sophisticated initiatives through vendor and internal engineering teams, ensuring alignment to architecture and operational standards

Partner with product management, architecture, security, finance, and operations to translate business needs into technology roadmaps

Provide technical and operational leadership for live production platforms, including incident management, root cause analysis, and continuous improvement

Mentor and develop enterprise technology resources, including engineers, analysts, and service providers

What you will need to be successful (experience and qualifications)

Core experience and qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent experience

Strong experience leading enterprise technology platforms and integrations within large-scale retail or energy environments

Hands-on knowledge of SAP Retail, PDI, or similar retail back office ecosystems

Proven ability to operate in complex, multi-vendor environments and influence without direct authority

Excellent stakeholder communication skills, from engineering teams through senior leadership

Comfort working through ambiguity, identifying risks, and driving pragmatic solutions

Enterprise technology & integration expertise

Enterprise integration patterns (APIs, events, batch, file-based integrations)

Retail transaction domains including pricing, inventory, reconciliation, promotions, and fuel workflows

Handling integrations between POS, ERP, finance, payments, loyalty, and fuel systems

Data exchange standards including XML, JSON, CSV, and EDI

Platform, cloud, and operations

Experience operating enterprise platforms on Microsoft Azure or AWS in partnership with infrastructure teams

Strong understanding of identity, networking, security, monitoring, and availability management

Experience supporting large-scale production systems, incident response, and service management processes

Knowledge of audit, compliance, and control frameworks relevant to enterprise technology environments

Skills that set you apart

Enterprise attitude with the ability to balance strategic vision and operational execution

Strong coaching and mentoring capabilities across both technical and functional roles

Ability to translate sophisticated technology topics into clear, business-focused communication

Customer-focused approach to delivering reliable and scalable enterprise capabilities

About bp

Our purpose is to deliver energy to the world, today and tomorrow. For over 100 years, bp has focused on discovering, developing, and producing oil and gas in the nations where we operate. We are one of the few companies globally that can provide governments and customers with an integrated energy offering. Delivering our strategy sustainably is fundamental to achieving our ambition to be a net zero company by 2050 or sooner!

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Additional Information

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

Even though the job is advertised as full time, please contact the hiring manager or the recruiter as flexible working arrangements may be considered.

What you can expect from us!

Our commitment to diversity, equity and inclusion:

At bp, you could be part of Business Resource Groups (BRGs) which belief in the power of inclusion, deeper connections, and shared experiences. They provide a place for employees to learn and share knowledge, to connect, and to improve. The BRGs focus on and encourage talent engagement, development, and retention while creating a broadened sense of community and inclusion for bp employees. The groups cultivate leadership growth by involving employees in developmental opportunities they would not otherwise have access to. Formal and informal mentoring also helps employees develop their professional goals and connect with colleagues. The BRGs’ dedication to growth at all levels helps employees feel more engaged and energized. The BRGs break down barriers, so we can all do better together. Examples of BRGs include (but are not limited to):

bpWIN (bp Women’s International Network)
Pride
Working parents
PEN (Positively Ethnic Network)
bpInclusia (bp’s Asian community)
bpEnergía (bp’s Latin community)

Legal Disclaimer:

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, socioeconomic status, neurodiversity/neurocognitive functioning, veteran status or disability status. Individuals with an accessibility need may request an adjustment/accommodation related to bp’s recruiting process (e.g., accessing the job application, completing required assessments, participating in telephone screenings or interviews, etc.). If you would like to request an adjustment/accommodation related to the recruitment process, please contact us.

If you are selected for a position and depending upon your role, your employment may be contingent upon adherence to local policy. This may include pre-placement drug screening, medical review of physical fitness for the role, and background checks.
Our innovative Energize recognition points programme and spot awards translate exceptional performance into tangible rewards, to motivate our high performers.

Pay

bp offers competitive pay in line with industry standards, making us an employer of choice.

Discretionary bonus

We offer discretionary bonuses to reward strong company, business unit and individual performance, and recognition awards, including those related to long service to recognize commitment to the company.

Retirement & savings

We offer a range of discretionary retirement and savings plans to help provide you and your family with financial security.

Insurance benefits

To give you additional peace of mind, bp provides valuable insurance benefits in some countries. These are designed to provide financial assistance to employees and their families if employees become unwell or die in service.

Equity

Depending on your location and job level, there may be equity (stock and share) options you are eligible to join so you can be part of bp’s success.
Disclaimer

This is a high-level summary only of terms and current discretionary benefits applicable to certain roles. Some rewards, benefits and policies are at managers’ discretion and vary depending on where you work within the business. All terms subject to contract and all discretionary benefits subject to policy and eligibility.

description.text:
Job category
IT&S
Experience level
Intermediate
Relocation available
This role is eligible for relocation within country
Job type
Professionals
Travel required
Up to 10% travel should be expected with this role
Job code
RQ109671
You will work with

You will be part of a growing hub in Pune, India and a growing team of ServiceNow skilled professionals at the hub. As a Senior Enterprise Technology Engineer in ServiceNow space will play a key role in designing and delivering high-quality, customer-focused solutions across multiple bp business entities. This role focus in ServiceNow Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM), where you will lead the design, implementation, upgrades, and enhancements of complex SPM solutions. You’ll also guide a high-performing team of developers and engineers, partnering with product owners and business leaders to drive transformative ServiceNow implementations that make a real impact.

What you will deliver:

Design, develop, test, and operate solutions for the ServiceNow platform, products, and integrations.

Ensure scalability and reliability through hands-on coding and adherence to software engineering best practices (technical design, reviews, unit testing, monitoring, version control, documentation).

Support a fast and agile product release while maintaining high service reliability following site reliability engineering best practices.

Contribute to ideas for automation, continual improvement and simplification

Apply deep knowledge of bp portfolio management processes—demand, financial, and resource management—alongside ServiceNow SPM out-of-the-box functionality.

What you will need to be successful (experience and qualifications):

Strong ability to resolve complex technical issues in application environments.

Experience with Agile/Scrum or DevOps methodologies.

Proven track record in designing, implementing, and maintaining scalable server-side software or platforms in complex environments.

Expertise in ServiceNow core applications (ITSM, GRC, SAM, ITOM, CMDB, SPM) and scripting (Business Rules, Workflow, Script Includes, UI Actions, Scheduled Jobs).

Proficiency in Web Services Integration (SOAP, REST, JSON) and web technologies (CSS, HTML).

Familiarity with supporting tools and technologies (LDAP, SSO, Identity Management, MID Servers, automated testing tools).

Understanding of risk management and remediation strategies.

Exposure to other platforms (Azure, AWS, Salesforce, Mulesoft, SAP, container platforms).

Experience and qualifications:

8–10 years of professional development experience on ServiceNow, including at least 3 years in technical solution design and Agile delivery with team leadership.

Certified ITIL v3 or v4 Foundation

ServiceNow Certified System Administrator or Application Developer

ServiceNow CSA, CIS-SPM (highly desired).

Why join our team?

At bp, we provide an excellent working environment and employee benefits such as an open and inclusive culture, a great work-life balance, tremendous learning and development opportunities to craft your career path, life and health insurance, medical care package and many others.

We support our people to learn and grow in a diverse and challenging environment. We believe that our team is strengthened by diversity. We are committed to crafting an inclusive environment in which everyone is respected and treated fairly.

There are many aspects of our employees’ lives that are meaningful, so we offer benefits to enable your work to fit with your life. These benefits can include flexible working options, collaboration spaces in a modern office environment, and many others benefits.

Reinvent your career as you help our business meet the challenges of the future.

Additional Criteria

Empathetic: Cares about our people, our community and our planet

Curious: Seeks to explore and excel

Creative: Imagines the extraordinary

Inclusive: Brings out the best in each other

Legal Disclaimer:

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, socioeconomic status, neurodiversity/neurocognitive functioning, veteran status or disability status. Individuals with an accessibility need may request an adjustment/accommodation related to bp’s recruiting process (e.g., accessing the job application, completing required assessments, participating in telephone screenings or interviews, etc.). If you would like to request an adjustment/accommodation related to the recruitment process, please contact us.

If you are selected for a position and depending upon your role, your employment may be contingent upon adherence to local policy. This may include pre-placement drug screening, medical review of physical fitness for the role, and background checks.
Our innovative Energize recognition points programme and spot awards translate exceptional performance into tangible rewards, to motivate our high performers.

Pay

bp offers competitive pay in line with industry standards, making us an employer of choice.

Discretionary bonus

We offer discretionary bonuses to reward strong company, business unit and individual performance, and recognition awards, including those related to long service to recognize commitment to the company.

Retirement & savings

We offer a range of discretionary retirement and savings plans to help provide you and your family with financial security.

Insurance benefits

To give you additional peace of mind, bp provides valuable insurance benefits in some countries. These are designed to provide financial assistance to employees and their families if employees become unwell or die in service.

Equity

Depending on your location and job level, there may be equity (stock and share) options you are eligible to join so you can be part of bp’s success.
Disclaimer

Some rewards, benefits and policies are at managers’ discretion and vary depending on where you work within the business. All terms subject to contract and all discretionary benefits subject to policy and eligibility.

  • Proficiency in Web Services Integration (SOAP, REST, JSON) and web technologies (CSS, HTML).

  • Familiarity with supporting tools and technologies (LDAP, SSO, Identity Management, MID Servers, automated testing tools).

  • Understanding of risk management and remediation strategies.

  • Exposure to other platforms (Azure, AWS, Salesforce, Mulesoft, SAP, container platforms).

Experience and qualifications:

  • 8–10 years of professional development experience on ServiceNow, including at least 3 years in technical solution design and Agile delivery with team leadership.

  • Certified ITIL v3 or v4 Foundation

  • ServiceNow Certified System Administrator or Application Developer

  • ServiceNow CSA, CIS-SPM (highly desired).

Why join our team?

At bp, we provide an excellent working environment and employee benefits such as an open and inclusive culture, a great work-life balance, tremendous learning and development opportunities to craft your career path, life and health insurance, medical care package and many others.

We support our people to learn and grow in a diverse and challenging environment. We believe that our team is strengthened by diversity. We are committed to crafting an inclusive environment in which everyone is respected and treated fairly.

There are many aspects of our employees’ lives that are meaningful, so we offer benefits to enable your work to fit with your life. These benefits can include flexible working options, collaboration spaces in a modern office environment, and many others benefits.

Reinvent your career as you help our business meet the challenges of the future.

Additional Criteria

  • Empathetic: Cares about our people, our community and our planet

  • Curious: Seeks to explore and excel

  • Creative: Imagines the extraordinary

  • Inclusive: Brings out the best in each other

Legal Disclaimer:


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, socioeconomic status, neurodiversity/neurocognitive functioning, veteran status or disability status. Individuals with an accessibility need may request an adjustment/accommodation related to bp’s recruiting process (e.g., accessing the job application, completing required assessments, participating in telephone screenings or interviews, etc.). If you would like to request an adjustment/accommodation related to the recruitment process, please contact us.


If you are selected for a position and depending upon your role, your employment may be contingent upon adherence to local policy. This may include pre-placement drug screening, medical review of physical fitness for the role, and background checks.


Our innovative Energize recognition points programme and spot awards translate exceptional performance into tangible rewards, to motivate our high performers.


Pay


bp offers competitive pay in line with industry standards, making us an employer of choice.

Discretionary bonus


We offer discretionary bonuses to reward strong company, business unit and individual performance, and recognition awards, including those related to long service to recognize commitment to the company.

Retirement & savings


We offer a range of discretionary retirement and savings plans to help provide you and your family with financial security.

Insurance benefits


To give you additional peace of mind, bp provides valuable insurance benefits in some countries. These are designed to provide financial assistance to employees and their families if employees become unwell or die in service.

Equity


Depending on your location and job level, there may be equity (stock and share) options you are eligible to join so you can be part of bp’s success.

All terms subject to contract and all discretionary benefits subject to policy and eligibility.

description.text:
Job category
IT&S
Experience level
Intermediate
Relocation available
This role is eligible for relocation within country
Job type
Professionals
Travel required
Up to 10% travel should be expected with this role
Job code
RQ110115
You will work with

This role operates within a cross-functional product team and collaborates closely with product managers, engineers, researchers, and other designers. Engagement may also extend to data, operations, and support teams when product experiences intersect with broader operational processes.

The team values thoughtful discussion, constructive feedback, and knowledge sharing. Designers contribute to maintaining strong design practices while supporting collaboration across disciplines.

Let me tell you about the role

The Senior Product Designer is responsible for shaping complex product experiences that require a strong understanding of user needs, business objectives, and system dependencies. The role focuses on structuring end-to-end user journeys, translating research insights into practical design solutions, and supporting teams in navigating ambiguous problem spaces.

Work at this level requires strong foundations in interaction design, service thinking, and visual design. The role contributes to the development of scalable product patterns and ensures design outcomes remain consistent with established systems and accessibility standards.

Awareness of emerging technologies, including AI-enabled tools and product capabilities, supports informed design decisions and efficient design workflows.

What you will deliver

Research and insight synthesis: Research activities such as interviews, usability testing, and behavioral observation are planned or supported. Insights are synthesized into journey maps, experience principles, and structured design recommendations.

Experience design: User journeys, task flows, and interaction patterns are defined for complex product workflows. Service blueprints may be created to illustrate user interactions and supporting system processes.

Design execution and prototyping: Wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity interfaces are developed using established design systems and accessibility standards.

Cross-functional collaboration: Design solutions are developed in partnership with product and engineering teams to ensure alignment with product requirements and technical constraints.

Design facilitation and feedback: Workshops, feedback sessions, and collaborative discussions are facilitated to improve design outcomes and support shared understanding.

Design system contribution: Opportunities to strengthen design systems are identified through new or refined patterns that support consistency across products.

AI-assisted design exploration: AI-supported tools may be used for exploration, research synthesis, or documentation, with attention to accuracy, ethics, and inclusivity.

What you will need to be successful (Experience and Qualifications)
Several years of hands-on product design experience delivering complex digital experiences.
A portfolio demonstrating strong reasoning, interaction design capability, and ability to address ambiguous problems.
Experience conducting or contributing to user research and translating insights into structured design solutions.
Strong communication and facilitation skills.
Familiarity with design systems, accessibility standards, and scalable product design approaches.
Openness to exploring emerging tools and AI-assisted workflows.

At this level, the Senior Product Designer contributes to initiatives spanning multiple product areas or teams. Their work connects insights, product priorities, and operational considerations to deliver scalable design outcomes.

Informal mentorship and fostering alignment across teams is a key aspect of the role.

About bp

Our purpose is to deliver energy to the world, today and tomorrow. For over 100 years, bp has focused on discovering, developing, and producing oil and gas in the nations where we operate. We are one of the few companies globally that can provide governments and customers with an integrated energy offering. Delivering our strategy sustainably is fundamental to achieving our ambition to be a net zero company by 2050 or sooner.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, perform essential job functions, and receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Grade H

Does the person manage a team?

No direct reports. The role includes informal mentorship and guidance for junior designers within the team.

Work location

Pune, Maharashtra (Hybrid)

Legal Disclaimer:

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, socioeconomic status, neurodiversity/neurocognitive functioning, veteran status or disability status. Individuals with an accessibility need may request an adjustment/accommodation related to bp’s recruiting process (e.g., accessing the job application, completing required assessments, participating in telephone screenings or interviews, etc.). If you would like to request an adjustment/accommodation related to the recruitment process, please contact us.

If you are selected for a position and depending upon your role, your employment may be contingent upon adherence to local policy. This may include pre-placement drug screening, medical review of physical fitness for the role, and background checks.
Our innovative Energize recognition points programme and spot awards translate exceptional performance into tangible rewards, to motivate our high performers.

Pay

bp offers competitive pay in line with industry standards, making us an employer of choice.

Discretionary bonus

We offer discretionary bonuses to reward strong company, business unit and individual performance, and recognition awards, including those related to long service to recognize commitment to the company.

Retirement & savings

We offer a range of discretionary retirement and savings plans to help provide you and your family with financial security.

Insurance benefits

To give you additional peace of mind, bp provides valuable insurance benefits in some countries. These are designed to provide financial assistance to employees and their families if employees become unwell or die in service.

Depending on your location and job level, there may be equity (stock and share) options you are eligible to join so you can be part of bp’s success.

description.text:
Job Description Summary
In this role you will be responsible for winning business Operates with some autonomy but are typically subject to standard sales practices and procedures. The role is subject to regular review of sales results. Some judgment may be required but this is typically with guidance. May be responsible for medium-sized sales territories.

GE Healthcare is a leading global medical technology and digital solutions innovator. Our mission is to improve lives in the moments that matter. Unlock your ambition, turn ideas into world-changing realities, and join an organization where every voice makes a difference, and every difference builds a healthier world.

Job Description

Roles and Responsibilities:

Responsible for selling products, services, parts, solutions, or projects within a defined geographic area.

Expands knowledge of assigned territory, product lines, markets, sales processes, and customer groups to effectively implement policy and strategy, while continuing to build higher-level expertise. Possesses a basic understanding of key business drivers and applies this knowledge to deliver results.

Demonstrates good awareness of how the team’s work integrates with other functions and contributes to overall business objectives.

Operates with some autonomy to make decisions within established frameworks, resolving issues that require commercial judgment while consulting senior colleagues for matters beyond defined parameters.

Strong interpersonal skills are essential, with regular communication across teams and the business to coordinate services. In customer-facing roles, builds lasting relationships and acts as the primary interface between the customer and GE HealthCare, clearly explaining technical information and ensuring customer needs are met.

The incumbent will be based in Guwahati

Required Qualifications:

This role requires basic experience of 6+ years in the medical equipment sales (imaging experience preferred)

Knowledge level is comparable to a Bachelor's degree from an accredited university or college.

Desired Characteristics:

Strong oral and written communication skills.

Ability to document, plan, market, and execute programs.

Inclusion and Diversity

GE HealthCare is an Equal Opportunity Employer where inclusion matters. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.

We expect all employees to live and breathe our behaviors: to act with humility and build trust; lead with transparency; deliver with focus, and drive ownership – always with unyielding integrity.

Our total rewards are designed to unlock your ambition by giving you the boost and flexibility you need to turn your ideas into world-changing realities. Our salary and benefits are everything you’d expect from an organization with global strength and scale, and you’ll be surrounded by career opportunities in a culture that fosters care, collaboration and support

Disclaimer: GE HealthCare will never ask for payment to process documents, refer you to a third party to process applications or visas, or ask you to pay costs. Never send money to anyone suggesting they can provide employment with GE HealthCare.

#LI-ML1

#LI-Onsite

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: Yes
